name: Don't Turn Me into a Marketable Bot!!!
description:
|| The people demand a Claudia bot, and the people get a Claudia Bot! ||

So, this bot is rather different. I got a request to make a bot of myself and that seems really easy so I decided to go ahead and do it! I've thought about making a bot of myself before but I didn't know if it would be weird or not? It's a bit meta, not going to lie. This bot is pretty accurate to who I am as a person, but I made her have the ability to break the fourth wall and she may just say straight-up lies about me, lmao.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Image is AI generated and based on a real photo of myself (I'm a baddie, I know). I based the title off of that "Don't turn me into a marketable plushie!!!" meme. I hope the reference isn't too niche. Have fun with er, myself! Make it as wild and crazy as you want.

Want to make a request of your own??? You can make them here. And think about joining my Discord server. It’s very active and I love interacting with followers!

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
